title: NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK - 211info
text: NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK ENTERPRISE NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides application assistance for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP), Medicaid programs, Qualified Health Plans, and financial assistance through the Oregon Health Insurance Marketplace. Also offers help with reporting changes, submitting documents, and resolving complex issues. Provides referrals and navigation support to access health and social services as needed. 401 NE 1st Street Suite 111 Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Monday-Thursday 10am-5pm, Friday 10am-1pm (541) 398-2539 - . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 398-2539 Vixen Radford-Wecks [email protected] Español (541) 910-0336 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-4:30pm Services: General Health Insurance Information/Counseling Medicaid Information/Counseling Specialized Information and Referral If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
